name: Cai Peiliang
tagline: Software Engineering @ SYSU | Researching Agentic RAG & AI Agents
intro: Hi, I'm Peiliang Cai, a Software Engineering student at Sun Yat-sen University, working under the guidance of Dr. Weibin Wu.

My current research focuses on the design and implementation of Agentic RAG. I am deeply passionate about exploring the frontiers of AI Agents and abstracting elegant system architectures from complex logic to build next-generation AI-native productivity tools.

certificates.title: 🎓 CCF Large Model Capability Certification (LMCC) Level 3

hobbies.title: Body Transformation
hobbies.desc: I am a fitness enthusiast on a journey to reach a target weight of 70kg. To me, it is a practice of discipline and consistent growth.

hobbies.title: Spirit of Wuxia
hobbies.desc: Living for freedom and staying true to one's heart.
hobbies.quote: My name is Ah Liang, 'Liang' as in 'Kindness'.
